---
title: "test_odin_persistence.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\tests\quarantine\test_odin_persistence.py"
loc: 18
complexity: 1
logic_score: 9.30
style_score: 3.66
intel_score: 9.40
overall_score: 5.92
---

## Intent
The `test_odin_persistence.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on mock_persistence, test_persistence_save_load. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via mock_persistence, test_persistence_save_load. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 9.3/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.7/10
- **Intel [I]**: 9.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 5 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [json](file://json)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [pytest](file://pytest)
- [src.games.odin_protocol.engine.persistence](file://src.games.odin_protocol.engine.persistence)

### Exports
- `mock_persistence`
- `test_persistence_save_load`
